commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bounded sanitization for uncloneable diagnostic event private data, catches model-content JSON/string fallback failures, and hardens diagnostics-otel GenAI content normalization for unreadable captured fields.

PR surface: Source +174, Tests +179. Total +353 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main directly calls structuredClone for listener copies and has a final String(value) fallback that can throw on hostile diagnostic content. I did not run tests because this review is read-only, but the PR adds focused repro tests for those paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer handling for a draft, maintainer-labeled PR with no narrow automation repair from this review.

target.title: fix(diagnostics): sanitize uncloneable model content
target.body:
## Summary
- make trusted diagnostic-event listener copies fall back to a bounded sanitizer when `structuredClone` cannot clone captured model content
- keep model-call diagnostic capture from throwing when captured tool definitions fail clone, JSON serialization, and string coercion
- harden diagnostics-otel GenAI content normalization so unreadable tool schema/message fields do not abort span export

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/diagnostic-events.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` passed 3 shards / 130 tests after rebase
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/diagnostic-events.ts src/infra/diagnostic-events.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts` passed
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/infra/diagnostic-events.ts src/infra/diagnostic-events.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts` passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean after fixing one accepted finding
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch` clean
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` passed on AWS Crabbox: provider `aws`, run `run_7583b71002b0`, lease `cbx_a6ae20fa7cbc`, slug `crimson-hermit`, type `c7a.8xlarge`, exit 0, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, `extensions`, `extensionTests`, command 9m1.362s, total 11m33.689s, lease stopped
- agent transcript finder returned `[]`

Behavior addressed: hostile or uncloneable captured model-content/tool-definition data can no longer crash diagnostic dispatch, model-call capture, or diagnostics-otel span export.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw worktree on Node 24 plus AWS Crabbox changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/diagnostic-events.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts extensions/diagnostics-otel/src/service.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.
Evidence after fix: diagnostic dispatcher tests receive sanitized trusted private data, model-call capture emits started/completed events with unserializable tool definitions, diagnostics-otel exports spans with readable fields plus truncation markers for unreadable schema fields, and remote changed gate passed all changed lanes.
Observed result after fix: all focused tests passed after rebasing on current `origin/main`; Crabbox changed gate exited 0.
What was not tested: full repo suite outside the changed-gate lanes.
